clearRetainedTextConfirmDesc.message: Are you sure you want to clear the staged content? This action cannot be undone.

contextMenuSendCurrentPageToSidepanel.message: Send current page URL to side panel

contextMenuSendLinkToSidepanel.message: Send link content to side panel

contextMenuSendToIncognito.message: Send selected text to new incognito tab

contextMenuSendToSidepanel.message: Send selected text to side panel

currentUrlLoaded.message: Current page URL has been loaded

extDescription.message: Send web page text or link content to the side panel, edit it, and open it in a new tab or incognito tab.

fileAccessWarning.message: To allow this extension to access local files, enable **Allow access to file URLs** in chrome://extensions for this extension.

helpContextMenuDesc1.message: For some reasons, it is not possible to design a single context menu option that can open/close the side panel with one click, so it has to be split into two separate options. You can go to Settings and disable the **Enable close side panel menu** option to keep only the open side panel menu. We apologize for this inconvenience.

helpContextMenuDesc2.message: Additionally, after clicking any context menu option that sends content to the side panel, you need to manually open the side panel to view the content. **Unsupported pages may not be able to use the context menu options for sending content to the side panel or new incognito tab.**

helpFeature1.message: Send selected text, links, or page URLs to the side panel for editing

helpFeature2.message: Open edited content in a new tab or new incognito tab

helpFeature3.message: Save and load staged text content in the side panel

helpFeature4.message: Send selected text directly to new incognito tab via the context menu

helpFeature5.message: Customize context menu items and other settings in the side panel

helpFooter.message: Send Content to Tab - An open source extension

helpIncognitoDesc1.message: Without the **Allow in incognito** option enabled, whether triggered from the side panel or the context menu, the extension will always open content in a newly created incognito window. Therefore, to ensure it opens in an existing incognito window, please enable **Allow in incognito** in chrome://extensions for this extension.

helpIncognitoDesc2.message: When **Allow in incognito** is enabled, after clicking the **Open in new incognito tab** button or selecting **Send selected text to new incognito tab** from the context menu, you may notice that the existing incognito window does not immediately come to the foreground. This is expected behavior, as new incognito tab has already been opened in the background. Please check all open browser windows.

helpIncognitoNote.message: You need to enable the **Enable incognito features** option in Settings to use incognito-related features.

helpIncognitoTitle.message: About opening in an incognito tab

helpPageTitle.message: User Guide - Send Content to Tab

helpSearchEngineDesc.message: By default, this extension uses Google or the browser's configured default search engine. You can enable the **Enable the custom search engine temporarily** option in the side panel settings to select a preferred search engine. Note that this feature is session-scoped to the side panel only, and the context menu **Send selected text to new incognito tab** will still use Google search engine for some reasons. To ensure optimal browser experience and comply with browser policies, this option is automatically disabled when the side panel is closed.

helpSettingsDesc.message: You can customize the extension behavior in the side panel settings, including enabling/disabling the context menu, enabling/disabling the close side panel menu, and enabling text staging.

incognitoDisabledHint.message: Extension is already running in incognito mode

incognitoTabOpened.message: New incognito tab has been opened

resetSettingsConfirmDesc.message: Are you sure you want to reset all settings? This action cannot be undone.

resetSettingsDesc.message: Reset all settings to their default values.

searchEngineCustomUrlDesc.message: Use {searchTerms} as placeholder for the query.

searchEngineCustomUrlError.message: Invalid URL. Please enter a valid URL containing {searchTerms}.

searchEngineCustomUrlSaved.message: Custom search engine URL has been saved

searchEngineSessionNote.message: Changes to the search engine selection will persist until the side panel is closed.

searchEngineSettings.message: Enable the custom search engine temporarily

searchEngineSettingsDesc.message: Choose which search engine to use when opening text as a search query.

searchEngineToggleDesc.message: Enable to customize the search engine used when opening text as a search query.

SendContentToSidepanel.message: Send selected content to side panel

SendCurrentPageToSidepanel.message: Send current page URL to side panel

settingsCloseSidepanelEnabledDesc.message: Show the 'Close Extension Side Panel' option in the context menu.

settingsEnableContextMenuDesc.message: Show context menu items to send selected text, links, or page URLs to the side panel or incognito window.

settingsIncognitoEnabledDesc.message: Show the incognito button in the side panel and the 'Send selected text to new incognito tab' option in the context menu.

settingsResetSuccess.message: All settings have been reset to defaults

settingsRetainTextDesc.message: Show buttons to save and load text content in the side panel. If disabled, the staged content will be cleared.

sidePanelOpenTab.message: Open in new tab on the current window
